name: cloud-pro
notes: Built-in: MiniMax-M2.7 cloud model. Works well with structured tool_calls.

name: local-coder
notes: Built-in: qwen2.5-coder:7b ollama model. Does NOT use structured tool_calls - needs text parsing.

name: gemma4-4b-ollama
notes: Works with structured tool_calls correctly. No text parsing needed.

name: Qwen2.5-coder-14b
notes: Does NOT use structured tool_calls. Puts JSON in text format. Needs text parsing.

name: qwen2.5-coder-7b-instruct-q8
notes: Likely similar to other qwen2.5-coder models. May need text parsing.

name: qwen2.5-coder-3b
notes: Smaller model. Likely needs text parsing like other qwen2.5-coder variants.

name: qwen2.5-coder-1.5b
notes: Smallest qwen2.5-coder variant. Likely needs text parsing and small model guidance.

name: deepseek-free
notes: OpenRouter model. Works with structured tool_calls.

name: deepseek-coder-6.7b
notes: Ollama model. May need text parsing - untested.

name: llama3.2
notes: Ollama model. No tool use detected in testing - may need text parsing.

name: llama3.1-8b
notes: Ollama model. No tool use detected in testing - may need text parsing.

name: Poolside-laguna-free
notes: OpenRouter model. Unknown structured tool call support.

name: Gemm4-26b-free
notes: OpenRouter model. Has response_format json_object set.

name: qwen3-next-80b
notes: OpenRouter model. Had rate limit issues in testing.

name: nomic-embed-text
notes: Embedding model - not suitable for tool calling or code review.
